bug_classification.reasoning: Title and body describe a concrete measurement defect with observed vs expected values (1.1 GB reported vs ~7 GB real, ~6x under-measurement). Root-cause and proposed-fix structure in the draft. Breaks auto-parallelism math on the canonical 24 GB Apple Silicon target. Piggybacked enhancement (#249 graphOptimizationLevel re-enable) is also bug-fix-adjacent (undoing a GH-238 workaround).
